statement: In every magma, Equation 2988 (`x = ((y * (z * x)) * w) * w`) implies Equation 1416 (`x = y * (((z * w) * w) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0463
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z x)) w) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op (op z w) w) y))
